query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `watchlistStocks` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `ticker` varchar(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `companyName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `sector` varchar(100),
  `industry` varchar(150),
  `category` varchar(100),
  `country` varchar(50),
  `currency` varchar(10),
  `marketCap` varchar(50),
  `source` enum('manual','ai_recommended') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  `aiReason` text,
  `peRatio` varchar(50),
  `pegRatio` varchar(50),
  `dividendYield` varchar(50),
  `beta` varchar(50),
  `currentPrice` varchar(50),
  `week52High` varchar(50),
  `week52Low` varchar(50),
  `rsi14` varchar(50),
  `signalScore` int DEFAULT 0,
  `signalType` enum('buy','sell','hold') DEFAULT 'hold',
  `lastMetricsUpdate` timestamp NULL,
  `isActive` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `notes` text,
  `addedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `ix_watchlist_ticker` (`ticker`),
  INDEX `ix_watchlist_source` (`source`),
  INDEX `ix_watchlist_category` (`category`),
  INDEX `ix_watchlist_sector` (`sector`)
);
command:

  `dividendYield` varchar(50),
  `beta` varchar(50),
  `currentPrice` varchar(50),

  `rsi14` varchar(50),

  `isActive` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `notes` text,
  `addedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `ix_watchlist_ticker` (`ticker`),
  INDEX `ix_watchlist_source` (`source`),
